datasets.name: ca4b24b9
queryLines: -- cohort builder for Pixels Dashboard -- variant friendly with base ( SELECT meta:[ '0020000D' ] . Value [ 0 ]::STRING StudyInstanceUID, meta:[ '00081030' ] . Value [ 0 ]::STRING StudyDescription, meta:[ '0020000E' ] . Value [ 0 ]::STRING SeriesInstanceUID, meta:[ '0008103E' ] . Value [ 0 ]::STRING SeriesDescription, meta:[ '00200010' ] . Value [ 0 ]::STRING StudyID, -- meta:['00200011'].Value[0]::STRING SeriesNumber, -- meta:['00200013'].Value[0]::STRING InstanceNumber, meta:[ '00100010' ] . Value [ 0 ] . Alphabetic::STRING as PatientName, meta:[ '00100020' ] . Value [ 0 ]::STRING as PatientID, try_cast( try_to_timestamp(meta:[ '00100030' ] . Value [ 0 ]::STRING, "yyyyMMdd") as Date ) as PatientBirthDate, try_cast(left(meta:[ '00101010' ] . Value [ 0 ], 3)::STRING as int) as PatientAge, meta:[ '00100040' ] . Value [ 0 ]::STRING PatientSex, try_cast( try_to_timestamp(meta:[ '00080020' ] . Value [ 0 ]::STRING, "yyyyMMdd") as Date ) as StudyDate, meta:[ '00080050' ] . Value [ 0 ]::STRING AccessionNumber, meta:[ '00080060' ] . Value [ 0 ]::STRING Modality, meta:[ '00080008' ] . Value [ 0 ]::STRING ImageType, meta:[ '00180015' ] . Value [ 0 ]::STRING BodyPartExamined, meta:[ '00181030' ] . Value [ 0 ]::STRING ProtocolName, meta:[ '00080070' ] . Value [ 0 ]::STRING Manufacturer, meta:[ '00080080' ] . Value [ 0 ]::STRING InstitutionName, meta:[ '00080081' ] . Value [ 0 ]::STRING InstitutionAddress, meta:[ '0018700A' ] . Value [ 0 ]::STRING DetectorManufacturerName, meta:[ '0018700B' ] . Value [ 0 ]::STRING DetectorManufacturersModelName, meta:[ '00189024' ] . Value [ 0 ]::STRING MRTransmitCoilManufacturerName, meta:[ '00189025' ] . Value [ 0 ]::STRING ReceiveCoilManufacturerName, meta:[ '00120063' ] . Value [ 0 ]::STRING DeidentificationMethod, meta:[ '0008001C' ] . Value [ 0 ]::STRING SyntheticData, meta:[ '00120064' ] . Value [ 0 ]::STRING CodingSchemeVersion, meta:[ '00282110' ] . Value [ 0 ]::STRING LossyImageCompression, meta:[ '00131010' ] . Value [ 0 ]::STRING Creator FROM identifier(:table) where meta:[ '0020000D' ] . Value [ 0 ]::STRING is not null GROUP BY ALL ORDER BY StudyInstanceUID ) SELECT concat( 'view' ) as url, * FROM base

datasets.name: 9651ec0b
queryLines:
-- object catalogs
select concat(table_catalog, '.', table_schema, '.', table_name) as table
from system.information_schema.tables where table_name = 'object_catalog'

datasets.name: c2b374ba
queryLines:
-- Pixel Models
SELECT entity_name, served_entity_name, max(entity_version) entity_version, custom_model_config.*, max(change_time) change_time
FROM system.serving.served_entities 
where entity_name like '%pixels%'
and endpoint_delete_time is null
GROUP BY ALL
order by change_time desc

datasets.name: b589b5b1
queryLines:
-- files analysis
SELECT
  meta:[ '0020000D' ] . Value [ 0 ] StudyInstanceUID,
  meta:[ '0020000E' ] . Value [ 0 ] SeriesInstanceUID,
  meta:[ '00200011' ] . Value [ 0 ] SeriesNumber,
  meta:[ '00200013' ] . Value [ 0 ] InstanceNumber,
  meta:[ '00080018' ] . Value [ 0 ] SOPInstanceUID,
  *
FROM
  identifier(:table)

lines:
# Pixels Medical Imaging summary dashboard

Based on DICOM files that have been acquired, unzipped, ingested and parsed using the Pixels Solution Accelerator
- Select the Object Catalog table of your choosing
- Select your OHIF viewer app hostname
- Use barcharts and histograms to narrow selection of SeriesInstanceUIDs
- Use **view** link on bottom table to view SeriesInstances
Data associated with the file rather than the contents of the header
